## Summary
<!-- Describe what this PR does in 1-3 bullet points -->

## Type
- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] chore: Maintenance
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] test: Tests

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code compiles without errors (typecheck/build)
- [ ] Relevant tests pass (unit/integration/e2e)
- [ ] i18n: No hardcoded user-visible strings
- [ ] Security: No secrets in diff
- [ ] Evidence attached (log/screenshot/curl)
- [ ] Conventional commit title (type(scope): description)
